input: collaborative knowledge graph (user-item interactions + item-item and user-user relations from KG)
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: Graph Attention Networks (GAT) with dynamic attention
loss: supervised recommendation loss + multi-level contrastive loss (InfoNCE with MoCo)
key_idea: multi-level contrastive learning on user-user, item-item, and user-item views of the collaborative knowledge graph
